programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: In Cannes a larcenous French beauty and jewel thieves thwart Laura's plans for a tryst with Remington.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a movie-queen turned cosmetics-mogul accused of murdering her former lover to prevent the publication of some revealing photos.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A serial killer (Richard Gilliland) whose eventual target is Ben embarrasses him in court by leaving false clues.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While back home for the town's bicentennial festivities, Ben is retained to defend a man for two homicides linked to a 15-year-old crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While back home for the town's bicentennial festivities, Ben is retained to defend a man for two homicides linked to a 15-year-old crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: On his way to a dude ranch, Ben is knocked unconscious and dreams of himself as a frontier lawyer, with Conrad as a gunslinging client and Julie as the owner of a boardinghouse.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: When Jennifer buys a storage locker at auction, she discovers a dead body inside - along with a mask matching the deceased woman.

programme.title: Ruby Herring Mysteries
programme.desc: Reporter Ruby Herring heads to a mountain resort for her sister's wedding, which is thrown into turmoil when Ruby finds her mother's oldest friend, Sugar Tucker, drowned in a creek.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While bedridden, Jessica overhears a telephone conversation between two men who are plotting a murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica shares the plot of her new book, in which a law student (Shaun Cassidy) seeks the killer of an arrogant professor (George Grizzard) with many enemies.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pores through a long list of enemies and possible suspects when a janitor (George Takei) finds an obnoxious TV host dead in his office.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica enters the world of boxing in order to help her friend Harry, who is arrested for the murder of a devious boxing manager.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murder of one of Cabot Cove's most illustrious citizens, a world-famous artist (Foster Brooks).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: While bedridden, Jessica overhears a telephone conversation between two men who are plotting a murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica shares the plot of her new book, in which a law student (Shaun Cassidy) seeks the killer of an arrogant professor (George Grizzard) with many enemies.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pores through a long list of enemies and possible suspects when a janitor (George Takei) finds an obnoxious TV host dead in his office.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when a college freshman with well-connected parents and a secret life is murdered in a sleazy motel.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates an arson blaze in the Malibu hills that kills an unpopular ecology activist who was preventing a businessman's planned housing development.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark sets out to discover who tried to kill a high-profile millionairess only to learn that she was not the intended victim.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark (Dick Van Dyke) attempts to solve the murder of a famous basketball player. Ken Howard, Malik Sealy and Pooh Richardson guest star.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura's life is threatened when she finds evidence of a corporate embezzlement plot hidden in her apartment.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura and Remington search Malta to find the body of a murdered thief who sought a broken cross coveted by unknown assailants.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: The owner of a camp where amateurs pay to play baseball with pros hires the agency to prevent a murder; guest Mickey Mantle.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben's insurance agent (Ron Fassler) is charged with murdering a deceitful marriage counselor (Bryan Cranston) after the police learn the adviser was having an affair with the agent's wife (Kim Johnston Ulrich).

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: In a flashback case involving the young widow (Sheree J. Wilson) of a wealthy older man (Daniel Benzali), Ben recalls the investigative techniques his father taught him.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Evidence uncovered in Michelle's case may incriminate Ben's murder client (Brynn Thayer), but attorney/client privilege bars action.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Evidence uncovered in Michelle's case may incriminate Ben's murder client (Brynn Thayer), but attorney/client privilege bars action.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A grandmother's testimony is vital to Ben's defense of a youth who is charged with murdering his abusive father to protect his mother.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked
programme.desc: Hannah Swensen has her hands full with two romantic suitors, her baking business, a murdered customer, and the case to find her customer's killer.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Searched & Seized
programme.desc: Every year, Jennifer and her friend Miles Wexford participate in the organization of an auction of goods seized by the police. The night of the auction, Miles is found dead in his store. Every clue points to suicide, but there is more to it. Jennifer learns that he was in serious debt due to a gambling problem.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A 25-year comedy feud hampers Jessica's probe of a stabbing murder at her goddaughter's engagement party.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Grady Fletcher is in big trouble when his boss, a specialist in tax shelters, is found dead and he is the main suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when an old friend is killed in a car accident in Idaho -- the man's widow (Ellen Bry) believes it was an accident, but the victim's father (John McLiam) is sure it was murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica looks into a 30-year-old murder in a continuation of the story from the 1949 film "Strange Bargain.".

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A murder occurs while Jessica is recording one of her novels for the Mystery Books for the Blind series.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A 25-year comedy feud hampers Jessica's probe of a stabbing murder at her goddaughter's engagement party.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Grady Fletcher is in big trouble when his boss, a specialist in tax shelters, is found dead and he is the main suspect.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates when an old friend is killed in a car accident in Idaho -- the man's widow (Ellen Bry) believes it was an accident, but the victim's father (John McLiam) is sure it was murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: At a fashion premiere in Paris, Jessica gets involved in the murder investigation of a supper-club owner.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A coach's retirement, a stranger's arrival and deadly practical jokes cause Jessica to re-examine a 20-year-old murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An attorney (Patrick McGoohan) asks Jessica to testify for a colleague accused of murder on circumstantial evidence in Quebec.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits a convent to see a former sorority sister (Jane Powell) and winds up searching for a nun's killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Murder is on the agenda when top executives and their wives meet at a powerful tycoon's country estate.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's cousin Emma MacGill, a colorful dance hall performer, must solve the murder of a wealthy friend.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: If It's Thursday, It Must Be Beverly
programme.desc: Jessica helps Sheriff Tupper (Tom Bosley) when his seemingly harmless deputy (Rick Lenz) is accused of murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A bomb kills a TV producer (Ken Swofford) who stole a plot from one of Jessica's books, making Jessica a suspect in his death.

programme.title: A Beautiful Place to Die: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: After being forced into early retirement, former detective Jeff Jackson returns to a quiet life on Martha's Vineyard. Quiet, at least, until a body washes up and he's drawn back into crime solving.
